business_requirements.title: Automated Settlement Matching
business_requirements.description: The system must automatically match settlement records from the core ledger against payments gateway confirmations using a unified transaction ID, with no manual intervention for matched items.

acceptance_criteria.given: a transaction event is published by the core ledger
acceptance_criteria.when: the payments gateway confirmation arrives within the same business day
acceptance_criteria.then: the reconciliation engine matches and marks both records as reconciled within 60 seconds
the system returns a full audit trail including source system IDs, match timestamp, and analyst ID if a manual step occurred

business_requirements.rationale: Addresses the primary root cause of manual matching identified in the as-is process analysis.

business_requirements.title: Exception Queue with Automated Routing
business_requirements.description: Unmatched transactions must be automatically routed to a prioritised exception queue visible to operations analysts, with a configurable SLA timer.

acceptance_criteria.given: a transaction remains unmatched after 2 hours
acceptance_criteria.when: the reconciliation engine processes its next cycle
acceptance_criteria.then: the transaction appears in the exception queue assigned to the correct operations analyst with full context

acceptance_criteria.given: an exception item is in the queue
acceptance_criteria.then: the item is automatically escalated to the Operations Manager with an alert notification

business_requirements.rationale: Eliminates email-based exception management identified as a root cause of the 5-day resolution cycle.

business_requirements.title: Full Audit Trail Capture
business_requirements.description: All reconciliation events — matches, exceptions, overrides, and approvals — must be immutably logged with timestamp, actor ID, and system source.

acceptance_criteria.then: an immutable audit entry is created within 1 second, capturing event type, timestamp, actor, and source system references

acceptance_criteria.given: a regulatory audit request is received
acceptance_criteria.when: the compliance officer exports the audit package
acceptance_criteria.then: the export contains all events for the requested date range in a machine-readable and human-readable format within 5 minutes

business_requirements.rationale: Directly satisfies OBJ-003 and CCO sign-off requirement for regulatory examination readiness.
